# "Cosmic Oasis: Finding Refreshment in God's Vastness"
## Scripture
"The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing. He makes me lie down in green pastures, he leads me beside quiet waters, he refreshes my soul." - Psalm 23:1-3

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the vastness of God's creation. The stars, planets, and galaxies stretch out before us like an endless desert, yet amidst this vastness, God promises to be our oasis. Just as a traveler in the desert finds refuge in a lush haven, we can find refreshment in God's presence. The phases of the moon, the orbits of the planets, and the rhythms of the universe all remind us of God's sovereignty and care. In the stillness of the night, we can hear the gentle leading of our Shepherd, guiding us to green pastures and quiet waters.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the vastness of your creation, remind us that you are our cosmic oasis. Lead us to the quiet waters of your presence, where our souls can be refreshed and revitalized. Help us to trust in your sovereignty, even when the journey seems long and arid. Thank you for being our Shepherd, our guide, and our refuge. May we find peace and rest in your vast and wondrous creation. Amen.
